decisions.title: Commit to DLv3 full production rollout by Q2 2026
decisions.context: Multiple DLv3 infrastructure signals (ENG-9165 EKS cluster, ENG-9058 alerting, ENG-9169 grpc routing, ENG-9091 alert ordering) indicate production readiness work. This is core infrastructure for 'Embed Deeper' - enabling faster queries and real-time decisions.

arguments.for: Unblocks QueryEngine streaming (ENG-9040), enables Fresh Data Reads (ENG-8234), and supports K2 Mission pipeline (ENG-9104). Critical for North Star metric growth.
arguments.against: Alerting infrastructure still being stabilized (ENG-9160, ENG-9091). May need 2-3 more weeks of hardening before committing to date.

decisions.title: Prioritize Explore V2 Calculated Channels as Q1 2026 flagship feature
decisions.context: Six tickets focused on calculated channels (ENG-9181, ENG-9184, ENG-9182, ENG-9117, ENG-9180, ENG-9159) show concentrated effort. This directly serves 'Nail the Core' by making Explore the primary decision surface.
decisions.blockedBy: Dynamic window preview bug (ENG-9182), Y-axis interactions (ENG-9159)

arguments.for: High user demand (ENG-8335 shows attribution confusion). Calculated channels increase decisions per customer by enabling custom analytics without leaving Explore.
arguments.against: Multiple UX bugs indicate feature may not be ready for flagship launch. Risk of poor first impression if shipped buggy.

decisions.title: Defer Python Rules SDK updates to Q2 2026
decisions.context: Only one Python-related ticket (ENG-7055 ABAC APIs, ENG-9171 pandas upgrade) vs. 15+ Explore/infrastructure tickets. Python Rules mentioned in strategy but low signal volume suggests lower priority.

arguments.for: Focus engineering resources on higher-signal areas (Explore, DLv3). Python Rules can iterate later without blocking North Star growth.
arguments.against: May miss Q1 enterprise deals if Python SDK is blocking requirement. Could slow 'Build the Moat' if competitors ship first.

decisions.title: Establish 'Decision Capture' instrumentation standard by March 2026
decisions.context: North Star is Decisions Captured Per Customer, but signals show infrastructure work (K2 Mission ENG-9104, Job ID returns ENG-7918, observability ENG-9002) without explicit decision tracking.
decisions.blockedBy: No clear definition of what constitutes a 'captured decision' in product. Amplitude investigation (ENG-9088) suggests analytics gaps.

arguments.for: Cannot optimize North Star metric without measuring it. Every product area needs clear instrumentation for decision events.
arguments.against: May be premature - need to ship core features (Explore V2, DLv3) before optimizing measurement. Risk of analysis paralysis.

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy infrastructure execution week. 30 engineering tickets active across DLv3, Explore, and data pipelines. Low product/strategy signal - mostly implementation.
alerts: Zero signals detected for Canvas, Sift Edge, or Ask SIFT - 60% of product strategy has no active work
No explicit 'decision capture' instrumentation tickets despite North Star metric dependency
Explore V2 has 6 open bugs with Q1 deadline 18 days away - at risk of missing GA
Alerting infrastructure undergoing major changes (4 tickets) - production stability risk if rushed
